cases.output:
The selected assets describe opposite changes.

The PDF evidence says: “Figure 1. Trend rises after the third point.”  
The image observation says latency “falls after the third release” and that “Release 4 begins the sustained drop.”

So, the PDF chart describes a rise after the third point, while the image observation describes a sustained drop beginning after the third release.
